requirement.description: The gateway shall periodically transmit the consolidated turn activity status to the instrument cluster.
requirement.python_test_setup:
import os
import time
import pytest
import can

MSG_ID_GW_VEHICLE_STATUS = 0xC8
EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES = 5

@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
def can_bus():
    bus = can.interface.Bus(interface=os.getenv('CAN_INTERFACE', 'socketcan'), channel=os.getenv('CAN_CHANNEL', 'can0'), bitrate=500000)
    yield bus
    bus.shutdown()

def decode_turn_active(data_bytes: bytes) -> int:
    # TurnActive = bit 17 -> byte index 2, bit 1
    return (data_bytes[2] >> 1) & 0x01

def collect_gateway_messages(bus, duration_sec=2.0):
    msgs = []
    start = time.time()
    while time.time() - start < duration_sec:
        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.2)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == MSG_ID_GW_VEHICLE_STATUS:
            msgs.append(msg)
    return msgs

test_cases.title: Verify periodic transmission when no indicators are active
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Gateway operational; LeftIndicator=0; RightIndicator=0; Monitor CAN ID 0xC8
test_cases.expected_result: TurnActive = 0 in all frames; message transmitted periodically
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_per_001_all_inactive(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gateway_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES, 'Insufficient periodic messages'
    assert all(decode_turn_active(m.data) == 0 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify periodic transmission when left indicator is active
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Gateway operational; LeftIndicator=1; RightIndicator=0; Monitor CAN ID 0xC8
test_cases.expected_result: TurnActive = 1 in all frames; periodic transmission maintained
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_per_002_left_active(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gateway_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    assert all(decode_turn_active(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify periodic transmission when right indicator is active
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Gateway operational; LeftIndicator=0; RightIndicator=1; Monitor CAN ID 0xC8
test_cases.expected_result: TurnActive = 1 in all frames; periodic transmission maintained
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_per_003_right_active(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gateway_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    assert all(decode_turn_active(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify periodic transmission when both indicators are active
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Gateway operational; LeftIndicator=1; RightIndicator=1; Monitor CAN ID 0xC8
test_cases.expected_result: TurnActive = 1 in all frames; periodic transmission maintained
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_per_004_both_active(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gateway_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    assert all(decode_turn_active(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify periodic transmission remains consistent without state change
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Gateway operational; Indicator state constant; Monitor CAN ID 0xC8
test_cases.expected_result: TurnActive value remains constant across all periodic frames

test_cases.title: Verify periodic transmission continues after state transition
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Gateway operational; Indicators initially OFF; Monitor CAN ID 0xC8
test_cases.expected_result: TurnActive updates correctly and periodic transmission continues
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_per_006_state_transition(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gateway_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= EXPECTED_MIN_MESSAGES
    states = [decode_turn_active(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert states[-1] in (0, 1)

test_cases.title: Verify no loss of periodic turn status messages
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Gateway operational; Monitor CAN ID 0xC8 for extended duration
test_cases.expected_result: Gateway continuously transmits TurnActive without missing cycles
